steps.title: Set the output equal to 76
steps.content: The question asks for the input where $g(x)=76$. Since $g(x)=2x-148$, solve $$2x-148=76.$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content: Add $148$ to both sides: $$2x=224.$$ Then divide by $2$: $$x=112.$$

steps.title: Check by substitution
steps.content: Substitute $112$ into the function: $g(112)=2(112)-148=224-148=76$. This gives the required output, so the value of $x$ is 112.
